마가복음 8:1.content: In those days, when there was a very great multitude, and they had nothing to eat, Jesus called his disciples to himself, and said to them,

마가복음 8:2.content: “I have compassion on the multitude, because they have stayed with me now three days, and have nothing to eat.

마가복음 8:3.content: If I send them away fasting to their home, they will faint on the way, for some of them have come a long way.”

마가복음 8:4.content: His disciples answered him, “From where could one satisfy these people with bread here in a deserted place?”

마가복음 8:5.content: He asked them, “How many loaves do you have?” They said, “Seven.”

마가복음 8:6.content: He commanded the multitude to sit down on the ground, and he took the seven loaves. Having given thanks, he broke them, and gave them to his disciples to serve, and they served the multitude.

마가복음 8:7.content: They had a few small fish. Having blessed them, he said to serve these also.

마가복음 8:8.content: They ate, and were filled. They took up seven baskets of broken pieces that were left over.

마가복음 8:9.content: Those who had eaten were about four thousand. Then he sent them away.

마가복음 8:10.content: Immediately he entered into the boat with his disciples, and came into the region of Dalmanutha.

마가복음 8:11.content: The Pharisees came out and began to question him, seeking from him a sign from heaven, and testing him.

마가복음 8:12.content: He sighed deeply in his spirit, and said, “Why does this generation seek a sign? Most certainly I tell you, no sign will be given to this generation.”

마가복음 8:13.content: He left them, and again entering into the boat, departed to the other side.

마가복음 8:14.content: They forgot to take bread; and they didn’t have more than one loaf in the boat with them.

마가복음 8:15.content: He warned them, saying, “Take heed: beware of the yeast of the Pharisees and the yeast of Herod.”

마가복음 8:16.content: They reasoned with one another, saying, “It’s because we have no bread.”

마가복음 8:17.content: Jesus, perceiving it, said to them, “Why do you reason that it’s because you have no bread? Don’t you perceive yet, neither understand? Is your heart still hardened?

마가복음 8:18.content: Having eyes, don’t you see? Having ears, don’t you hear? Don’t you remember?

마가복음 8:19.content: When I broke the five loaves among the five thousand, how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up?” They told him, “Twelve.”

마가복음 8:20.content: “When the seven loaves fed the four thousand, how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up?” They told him, “Seven.”

마가복음 8:21.content: He asked them, “Don’t you understand yet?”

마가복음 8:22.content: He came to Bethsaida. They brought a blind man to him, and begged him to touch him.

마가복음 8:23.content: He took hold of the blind man by the hand, and brought him out of the village. When he had spat on his eyes, and laid his hands on him, he asked him if he saw anything.

마가복음 8:24.content: He looked up, and said, “I see men; for I see them like trees walking.”

마가복음 8:25.content: Then again he laid his hands on his eyes. He looked intently, and was restored, and saw everyone clearly.

마가복음 8:26.content: He sent him away to his house, saying, “Don’t enter into the village, nor tell anyone in the village.”

마가복음 8:27.content: Jesus went out, with his disciples, into the villages of Caesarea Philippi. On the way he asked his disciples, “Who do men say that I am?”

마가복음 8:28.content: They told him, “John the Baptizer, and others say Elijah, but others: one of the prophets.”

마가복음 8:29.content: He said to them, “But who do you say that I am?” Peter answered, “You are the Christ.”

마가복음 8:30.content: He commanded them that they should tell no one about him.

마가복음 8:31.content: He began to teach them that the Son of Man must suffer many things, and be rejected by the elders, the chief priests, and the scribes, and be killed, and after three days rise again.

마가복음 8:32.content: He spoke to them openly. Peter took him, and began to rebuke him.

마가복음 8:33.content: But he, turning around, and seeing his disciples, rebuked Peter, and said, “Get behind me, Satan! For you have in mind not the things of God, but the things of men.”

마가복음 8:34.content: He called the multitude to himself with his disciples, and said to them, “Whoever wants to come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me.

마가복음 8:35.content: For whoever wants to save his life will lose it; and whoever will lose his life for my sake and the sake of the Good News will save it.

마가복음 8:36.content: For what does it profit a man, to gain the whole world, and forfeit his life?

마가복음 8:37.content: For what will a man give in exchange for his life?

마가복음 8:38.content: For whoever will be ashamed of me and of my words in this adulterous and sinful generation, the Son of Man also will be ashamed of him, when he comes in his Father’s glory, with the holy angels.”
